# Isayah Young-Burke - AI & Infrastructure Consultant

> Portfolio website showcasing cloud infrastructure, AI consulting, creative projects, and professional services.

## About

Isayah Young-Burke is an Infrastructure & AI Consultant based in New York, specializing in cloud architecture, AI/ML implementations, creative technology, and audio engineering. With expertise spanning AWS, IONOS Cloud, Docker, and modern web frameworks, he helps businesses modernize their infrastructure and leverage AI capabilities.

## Core Services

- **Cloud Infrastructure**: AWS, IONOS, Docker containerization, CI/CD pipelines
- **AI Consulting**: LLM integration, voice AI, RAG systems, agent development
- **Web Development**: React, TypeScript, Vite, Next.js applications
- **Audio Engineering**: Music production, sound design, DJ services

## Featured Applications (27 Total)

### Production Apps (13)
- **Portfolio Website**: Personal portfolio with app galleries, music player, DJ EPK
- **Sensei AI**: GPT trainer for creating AI agents from your sources
- **Zen Reset**: Minimalist meditation web app with guided audio
- **Chord Genesis**: Intelligent music composition tool for chord progressions
- **Wolf AI**: Advanced AI assistant with TTS and MCP integration
- **Voice Assistant**: Real-time voice interaction with ElevenLabs
- **ContentForge**: Unified creative content platform for sprites, stories, voice
- **Cloud LLM Assistant**: Cloud-hosted conversational AI
- **DJ Visualizer**: Audio-reactive visualization for live performances
- **FineLine**: Timeline-based journal application
- **Game Hub**: Arcade gaming platform with mini-games
- **Sprite Gen**: Sprite generation tool for game developers
- **Knowledge Base**: Personal knowledge repository

### Beta/Testing Apps (11)
- Darkflow Mind Mapper, BH AI 79, GMAT Mastery Suite, Losk (Light Novel Hub)
- Purple Lotus (Zodiac Social), Got Hired AI, Zen ToT, IONOS Cloud Exam Prep
- Forge Fit, Slam OG Studio, Green Empire Landscaping (Client)

### In Development (4)
- Ashley v3, Sensei AI IO, Ask HR Beta, SOP AI Beta

## Projects

Over 30 completed projects across categories:
- **Cloud Infrastructure**: Enterprise migrations, CI/CD optimization, security frameworks
- **Web Hosting**: Scalable architectures, serverless platforms, Next.js deployments
- **Design & Marketing**: E-commerce, branding, WordPress implementations
- **Audio Engineering**: Album production, live mixing, spatial audio installations

## DJ Portfolio

DJ Zay - Electronic music DJ with mixes, event experience, and a timeline blog documenting the journey. Available for bookings.

## Music

PH Pool album with 25 tracks available on the music page.

## Contact

- Website: https://zaylegend.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/yetog

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Hosting: Self-hosted Linux server with Nginx, Docker containers
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions
- Storage: IONOS S3 for assets
